terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.readNotice: Please read these terms and conditions carefully before placing an order. By placing an order, you unreservedly accept these terms.
terms.article_1_content: These terms and conditions govern all transactions between {appName} and its customers. They define the rights and obligations of the parties in the context of the online sale of fine pastry products.
terms.article_2_content: The products offered for sale are accurately described on our site. Photographs are provided for informational purposes and may vary slightly. We reserve the right to modify our product range at any time.
terms.article_3_content: Prices are shown in DZD (Algerian dinars) all taxes included. Delivery costs are calculated separately and indicated before order confirmation. We reserve the right to change our prices at any time.
terms.article_4_content: The order is confirmed after payment validation. A confirmation email is sent to the customer. We reserve the right to cancel any order in case of stock issues or suspected fraud.
terms.article_5_content: Payment is due immediately upon ordering. Accepted payment methods are bank cards (Visa, Mastercard), CCP, Baridimob and cash on delivery. All transactions are secure.
terms.article_6_content: Delivery is made to the address indicated by the customer when ordering. Delivery times are provided as an indication. {appName} cannot be held responsible for delivery delays attributable to carriers.
terms.article_7_content: In accordance with applicable legislation, the customer has a period of 14 days to exercise their right of withdrawal from receipt of the product. Return shipping costs are borne by the customer.
terms.article_8_content: All our products are guaranteed to conform to the order. In case of a defective or non-conforming product, the customer may request an exchange or refund under the conditions provided by law.
terms.article_9_content: {appName}'s liability cannot be engaged for any indirect damage resulting from the use of purchased products or in case of force majeure as defined by case law.
terms.article_10_content: These terms are subject to Algerian law. In case of dispute, the parties will strive to find an amicable solution. Failing this, the courts of Algiers shall have sole jurisdiction.
terms.contactText: For any questions regarding our terms and conditions, please contact us at contact@lesucre.dz.

sizeGuide.subtitle: Find all the information you need to choose the perfect size.
sizeGuide.clothingDescription: Measurements in centimeters. To choose your size, take your measurements and refer to the table below.
sizeGuide.shoesDescription: Measure the length of your foot and refer to the table to find your size.
sizeGuide.accessoriesDescription: Refer to the measurements below to choose the size of your accessories.
sizeGuide.tip_chest_desc: Measure the chest circumference at the fullest part, passing the tape under the arms.
sizeGuide.tip_waist_desc: Measure the waist circumference at the narrowest part, usually above the navel.
sizeGuide.tip_hips_desc: Measure the hip circumference at the widest part, keeping feet together.
sizeGuide.tipsComingSoon: Detailed illustrations will be available soon to guide you.

shippingReturns.title: Shipping & Returns
shippingReturns.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our shipping options and return policy.
shippingReturns.zoneDesc: We deliver to all wilayas of Algeria, from Tamanrasset to Algiers.
shippingReturns.carrierDesc: In partnership with Yalidine, ZR Express and Algérie Poste for reliable delivery.
shippingReturns.delayDesc: 24-48h for Algiers, 2-5 days for the rest of the country.
shippingReturns.returnConditionsDesc: You have 14 days from receipt of your order to return a product that does not suit you.
shippingReturns.returnCondition1: The product must be in its original condition, unopened and in its original packaging. Customized or perishable products cannot be returned for hygiene reasons.
shippingReturns.returnCondition2: Return shipping costs are borne by the customer, except in the case of a defective product or an error on our part. Refund is issued within 5 to 10 business days after receipt of the package.
shippingReturns.step1_desc: Contact our customer service within 14 days of receipt.
shippingReturns.step2_desc: Carefully pack the product in its original packaging.
shippingReturns.step3_desc: Drop off the package at our partner carrier.
shippingReturns.step4_desc: Within 5 to 10 business days after receipt and verification.
shippingReturns.helpDesc: Our customer service team is here to assist you.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Last updated: January 1, 2026
privacy.intro: The protection of your personal data is a priority for {appName}. This policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information.
privacy.section_1_content: We collect information you provide when creating an account, placing an order, or submitting a contact form. This information includes your name, email address, delivery address and phone number.
privacy.section_2_content: The information collected is used to process your orders, improve our customer service, send you marketing communications (with your consent) and personalize your shopping experience.
privacy.section_3_content: We do not sell your personal information to third parties. Your data may be shared with our delivery partners (carriers) and payment providers, solely for the purpose of processing your order.
privacy.section_4_content: Our site uses cookies to improve your browsing experience, analyze traffic and personalize content. You can control cookie usage in your browser settings.
privacy.section_5_content: In accordance with applicable regulations, you have the right to access, rectify, erase and port your data. You can exercise these rights by contacting us at contact@lesucre.dz.
privacy.section_6_content: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, loss or disclosure.
privacy.section_7_content: Your personal data is kept for the period necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected, in accordance with applicable legal obligations.
privacy.footer: For any questions regarding our privacy policy, please contact us at contact@lesucre.dz.

newsletterConfirm.title: Newsletter Confirmation
newsletterConfirm.successDesc: Your subscription to our newsletter has been confirmed. You will now receive our exclusive offers, new arrivals and news.
newsletterConfirm.errorDesc: An error occurred while confirming your subscription. Please try again or contact us if the problem persists.
newsletterConfirm.followDesc: Stay connected with us so you don't miss any of our news.

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.heading: We'll be back soon!
maintenance.description: Our site is currently under maintenance to offer you a better experience. We'll be back in a few moments. Thank you for your patience.
maintenance.estimatedReturn: Estimated return: within the next few hours
maintenance.followText: Follow us on social media to stay informed:

faq.title: FAQ
faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions. If you can't find your answer, feel free to contact us.
faq.commandes_desc: Everything you need to know about the ordering process
faq.commandes_q_1: How do I place an order?
faq.commandes_a_1: To place an order, browse our catalog, add the desired items to your cart, then follow the checkout process. You will receive a confirmation by email.
faq.commandes_q_2: Can I modify my order after placing it?
faq.commandes_a_2: You can modify your order within 2 hours of confirmation. Contact our customer service for any changes.
faq.commandes_q_3: How do I cancel an order?
faq.commandes_a_3: Cancellation is possible within 2 hours of placing the order. After this time, please contact us directly.
faq.commandes_a_4: We accept payments by bank card (Visa, Mastercard), CCP, Baridimob, and cash on delivery.
faq.commandes_a_5: You will receive a confirmation email with your order number. Also check your spam folder.
faq.livraison_desc: Information about the delivery of your packages
faq.livraison_a_1: Delivery times vary depending on your location: 24-48h for Algiers, 2-5 days for other wilayas.
faq.livraison_a_2: Shipping costs are calculated based on your address and the weight of your order. Delivery is free for orders over 5,000 DZD.
faq.livraison_a_3: Yes, we deliver to all wilayas of Algeria via our partners Yalidine and ZR Express.
faq.livraison_a_4: Yes, a tracking number will be sent to you by email when your order is shipped.
faq.livraison_q_5: What if I'm not home at the time of delivery?
faq.livraison_a_5: The delivery person will contact you by phone. You can arrange another time or have it delivered to a neighbor.
faq.retours_desc: How to return or exchange a product
faq.retours_a_1: You have 14 days from receipt to return an unopened product in perfect condition.
faq.retours_q_2: How do I return a product?
faq.retours_a_2: Contact our customer service to obtain a return number. Carefully pack the product and drop it off at our partner carrier.
faq.retours_a_3: Return shipping costs are your responsibility, except in the case of a defective product or an error on our part.
faq.retours_a_4: Refund is made within 5 to 10 business days after receipt and verification of the returned product.
faq.retours_a_5: Yes, you can request an exchange. Contact our customer service for the procedure.
faq.paiements_q_1: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.paiements_a_1: We accept bank cards (Visa, Mastercard), CCP, Baridimob, and cash on delivery.
faq.paiements_a_2: For the moment, we do not offer installment payments. This option will be available soon.
faq.paiements_a_3: Yes, all payments are encrypted and secure. We use technologies that comply with banking standards.
faq.paiements_a_4: Yes, cash on delivery is available for all orders, with a supplement of 200 DZD.
faq.compte_q_1: How do I create an account?
faq.compte_a_1: Click on 'My Account' at the top of the page, then follow the registration steps. It's free and fast.
faq.compte_a_2: Click on 'Forgot password' on the login page. A reset email will be sent to you.
faq.compte_q_3: How do I change my personal information?
faq.compte_a_3: Log in to your account and go to the 'My Information' section to modify your data.
faq.compte_q_4: Can I view my order history?
faq.compte_a_4: Yes, in your customer area, the 'My Orders' section lists all your purchases.
faq.ctaDesc: Our team is here to answer all your questions.
